name: X-Golf Worcester
address: Trolley Yard Plaza, 287 Grove St, Worcester, MA 01605
about: X-Golf Worcester provides a high-tech indoor golf experience using advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors within 9 golf simulators. The venue operates with a flexible pricing model, offering hourly rentals for up to 6 people per bay, alongside seasonal memberships that provide daily simulator access. It is equipped with a full bar, food menu, and amenities designed for play, training, and private events, making it suitable for both casual and serious golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with unparalleled accuracy and realism
Flexible options for practice, leagues, and tournaments
Comprehensive amenities including full bar, food, and event hosting

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar including John Daly's Good Boy Vodka and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Golf club rentals are available for $15, but bringing your own clubs is recommended if possible.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed. The venue has a full bar and food menu available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each individual can finish 18 holes in about one hour. For multiple players, plan an additional hour per person.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and the venue offers junior golf lessons and programs.
